pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Pink Panther (Chrome Ver.) 1000%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Pink Panther (Chrome Ver.) 1000%.  Pink Panther first appeared in the movie The Pink Panther in 1966, starring Peter Sellers in his iconic role as Inspector Clouseau. Since then the character has become an iconic part of American pop culture, with the character appearing in dozen of movies, cartoons, and varied merchandise, often appearing alongside his catchy and iconic theme song!  Now is your chance to own a piece of movie and pop culture history. Add the Pink Panther to your collection today!
